commit.subject: LU-19628 llog: fix llog_obd cleanup
commit.message:
LU-19628 llog: fix llog_obd cleanup

Ensure the env is not NULL to avoid call traces during the llog
context cleanup phase.

Signed-off-by: Xinxia Qu <xqu@ddn.com>
Change-Id: If5a14410240959c34ff3128be78a1e3ce7c9f399
